## edu-cli exam-node add-chapter

Add a chapter (and all its sub-chapters) to an exam node (添加章节及其所有子章节到考试节点)

```
edu-cli exam-node add-chapter [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --chapter-id uint     Chapter ID (required); all sub-chapters are included automatically
      --exam-node-id uint   Exam node ID (required)
  -h, --help                help for add-chapter
```

### SEE ALSO

* [edu-cli exam-node](edu-cli_exam-node.md)	 - Manage syllabus exam nodes (考试节点管理)
